CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.Name = 'Billing', IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Closed"), ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Canceled") ), Bill_Rate_Uploaded_Date_Stamp__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Bill_Rate_Uploaded_Date_Stamp__c)), Bill_Rate_Uploaded_Date_Stamp__c, Account__r.School_Object__r.Bill_Rate_Uploaded_Date__c ) ), NULL )
CustomField.label: Bill Rate Uploaded Date
